reviews.comment:
Excelente atención tanto  despachando nafta como en el shop, muy bueno  el café, los baños para clientes estaban con mucho olor, faltaría un poco de limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both at the gas station and in the shop, the coffee was very good, the customer restrooms had a strong smell and could use a little cleaning.
